# feat(ui): settings index/dashboard page

## Description

Add a settings index page at /ui/settings/ showing a summary of account status: profile completeness, email verification status, MFA status, active sessions count, PAT count.

## Objective

Provide a settings landing page that gives users an at-a-glance overview of their account status and quick navigation to each settings section.

## Tasks

- [ ] GET /ui/settings/ index page
- [ ] Profile completeness indicator
- [ ] Email verification status
- [ ] MFA status summary
- [ ] Active sessions count
- [ ] PAT count
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] BDD tests

## Dependencies

- #48 — UI user settings pages

## Labels

`feature:ui`, `layer:ui`, `size:S`
